error_desc: An unexpected situation happened during execution, you can try to refresh or retry.
not_found_desc: The page you are looking for might have been removed or is temporarily unavailable.

friend_links_desc: Like-minded sites, linking each other, lighting each other up.
friend_links_join_desc: Welcome to submit your site information, which will be displayed here after approval.
friend_links_fuwari_desc: Distance cannot separate true friends. If you also like to tinker, welcome to leave your footprint here.
post_share_success_desc: Post link has been copied to clipboard
post_share_error_desc: Could not access clipboard, please copy the link manually

match.query=*: Sorry, no content found for "{query}". Please try other keywords.

search_fuwari_intro_desc: Enter keywords above to start searching. Supports full-text search across titles, summaries, tags, and content.
friend_link_submit_desc: Submit your site information. It will be displayed on the friend links page after approval.
friend_link_placeholder_description_fuwa: One sentence description of your site
friend_link_validation_invalid_email: Please enter a valid email address
profile_settings_desc: Manage your personal information and preferences.
profile_email_notify_desc: Notify me when receiving replies or comments.
profile_email_notify_desc_fuwari: Send an email notification when you receive replies or comments from others.
profile_notify_status_failed: Failed to load notification status, please try again
profile_notify_unavailable: Email notifications are not enabled on this site
profile_notify_invalid_state: Notification status is invalid, please refresh and try again
profile_validation_name_min: Nickname must be at least 2 characters
profile_validation_name_max: Nickname must be at most 20 characters
profile_validation_new_password_min: New password must be at least 8 characters
profile_validation_password_mismatch: The two passwords do not match
profile_toast_security_synced: Your security settings have been synchronized.
auth_layout_login_required_desc: You need to log in to access this page.
auth_error_user_already_exists: This email has already been registered.
auth_error_user_not_found: No account was found for this user.
auth_error_invalid_token: The link is invalid or has expired.
auth_error_session_expired: Your session has expired. Please sign in again.
auth_error_credential_not_found: This account is not linked to the requested sign-in method.
login_welcome_back: Welcome back, please log in to your account
login_only_third_party_fuwari: Only quick third-party login is supported
turnstile_error_failed_desc: Please wait for verification to complete and try again.
request_error_permission_denied_desc: This action is only available to administrators.
request_error_turnstile_failed_desc: Please refresh the page and complete verification again.
request_error_turnstile_missing_token_de: Missing verification token. Please complete verification and try again.
login_toast_wait_turnstile: Please wait for verification to complete
login_toast_send_failed: Failed to send, please try again later
register_header_desc: Join us by filling out the information below
register_success_desc: A verification email has been sent to your email address. Please click the link in the email to activate your account.
register_validation_name_min: Nickname must be at least 2 characters
register_validation_name_max: Nickname must be at most 20 characters
register_validation_password_min: Password must be at least 8 characters
register_toast_verification_sent: Verification email sent, please check your inbox.
register_error_default: Server connection error, please try again later.
forgot_password_header_desc: Please enter your registered email address, and we will send you a password reset link.
forgot_password_success_desc: A reset link has been sent to {email}.
forgot_password_toast_sent_desc: Please check your inbox for the reset link.
reset_password_header_desc: Your identity has been verified. Please enter a new password below to complete the reset.
reset_password_error_missing_token_desc: Required security token is missing, please retrieve the link again.
reset_password_toast_failed_desc: The token may have expired, please request again.
reset_password_toast_success_desc: Please log in again with your new password.
unsubscribe_invalid_desc: The unsubscribe link is incomplete or has expired. Please click the full link at the bottom of the email, or manage your subscriptions in your profile.
unsubscribe_failed_desc: Unsubscribe request failed. The link may have expired or the signature is invalid.
unsubscribe_success_desc: You have successfully unsubscribed from this type of notification email. You can resume subscriptions in your profile at any time.
verify_email_success_desc: Your email has been successfully verified. You can now enjoy full access.
verify_email_error_invalid_token_desc: The verification link has expired or is invalid.
verify_email_error_generic_desc: An error occurred during verification. Please try again.
comments_delete_desc: Are you sure you want to delete this comment? If it is your comment, it will be marked as 'This comment has been deleted'.
comments_editor_placeholder: A friendly comment is the start of a good conversation...
comments_editor_modal_link_desc: Enter the URL address you want to link to.
comments_editor_modal_image_desc: Enter the URL address of the image.
comments_list_empty: No comments yet. Be the first to comment!

admin_sidebar_logout_message: Are you sure you want to end this admin session and sign out?
admin_overview_analytics_unconfigured_de: Set the UMAMI_SRC and VITE_UMAMI_WEBSITE_ID environment variables
admin_posts_delete_confirm_desc: Are you sure you want to permanently delete "{title}"? This action cannot be undone.
admin_posts_toast_delete_failed_desc: "{title}" does not exist or has been deleted
admin_post_edit_not_found_desc: The post record with ID {id} does not exist or has been removed.
editor_history_subtitle: Review auto snapshots, publish points, and restore backups before rolling back.
editor_history_empty: No snapshots yet. Auto snapshots will appear after the editor has been idle for a while.
editor_history_preview_empty: Select a snapshot to preview it here.
editor_history_restore_message: Restore the article to the version saved at {time}? The current draft will be backed up automatically before rollback.
editor_history_delete_message: Delete {count} selected snapshot(s)? This cannot be undone.
editor_history_toast_restore_success_des: "{title}" is now the current editor state.
editor_history_error_invalid_snapshot: The stored snapshot is invalid and cannot be restored.
editor_leave_message: You have unsaved changes. Leaving may cause data loss.
editor_action_publish_desc: Content processing and deployment analysis in progress.
editor_action_no_content_read_time: Please write some content before calculating read time.
editor_action_no_content_summary: Please write some content before generating a summary.
editor_image_upload_success_desc: {name} has been saved to the media library
editor_formula_placeholder: Enter LaTeX, e.g. x^2 + y^2 = z^2
tag_manager_delete_fail: Failed to delete: Tag not found
tag_manager_delete_desc: Are you sure you want to delete the tag "{tagName}"? This action cannot be undone. Posts associated with this tag will no longer display it.

match.count=*: Are you sure you want to permanently delete {count} media assets? This action cannot be reversed.

media_preview_delete_fail_desc: This asset is referenced by a post. Remove the reference first.
media_preview_delete_confirm: Are you sure you want to permanently delete this file?

match.count=*: {count} items deleted. Some assets are in use and could not be deleted.

media_toast_delete_fail_desc: Assets are in use by posts and cannot be deleted

match.count=*: {count} items are currently in use. Deselect them first.

media_upload_error_db: Failed to store media, please try again
media_validation_file_required: Please select an image file to upload
media_validation_file_too_large: File size must be less than 10MB
comments_destroy_modal_desc: This will permanently wipe the comment! Consider moving it to Trash instead.
comments_toast_delete_not_found: Failed to delete: Comment not found
comments_toast_destroy_not_found: Failed to destroy: Comment not found
comments_moderation_reason_empty_pending: The comment is empty and requires manual review
comments_moderation_reason_ai_unavailabl: The AI moderation service is temporarily unavailable, pending manual review
friend_links_destroy_modal_desc: This will permanently delete the link. This action cannot be undone!
friend_links_add_modal_desc: Manually added links will be directly approved.
friend_links_toast_submit_duplicate: This site URL has already been submitted
friend_links_toast_submit_success_desc: You will be notified by email after admin review.
settings_toast_save_error: Failed to save settings, please try again
settings_header_desc: Configure email notifications, webhooks, and system maintenance.
settings_site_section_theme_desc: Current build theme: {theme}. Only options used by this theme are shown here.
settings_site_section_basic_desc: Configure the site title, author, description, and related basic info.
settings_site_section_social_desc: Public contact links displayed on the site.
settings_site_section_icons_desc: Upload your favicons and app icons for different platforms. Generate an icon pack with realfavicongenerator.net first, then fill in the site asset paths.
settings_site_field_title_hint: Used for page titles, manifest name, and related metadata.
settings_site_field_description_hint: Used for page descriptions and related SEO metadata.
settings_site_field_description_ph: A short description of your site.
settings_site_field_navbar_name_hint: Brand label shown in the default theme navigation.
settings_site_field_home_image_hint: Supports a site asset path or an external image URL, and you can also upload directly. External URLs do not go through site image optimization and may affect first-load performance.
settings_site_field_global_image_hint: Supports a site asset path or an external image URL, used on non-home pages and transition states. External URLs do not go through site image optimization and may affect first-load performance.
settings_site_field_light_opacity_hint: Controls how visible the background image is in light mode. Higher values make it more noticeable.
settings_site_field_dark_opacity_hint: Controls how visible the background image is in dark mode. Higher values make it more noticeable.
settings_site_field_backdrop_blur_hint: Controls how much the background image is blurred to balance atmosphere and text readability. Higher values reduce detail.
settings_site_field_transition_duration_: Only affects the default theme background layer fade, mainly for homepage background switching. It does not control router-level page transitions.
settings_site_field_primary_hue_hint: Controls the fuwari theme accent hue. Changing it updates links, buttons, highlights, and tinted surfaces.
settings_site_primary_preview_desc: Live fuwari accent preview, current hue: {hue}deg.
settings_site_primary_preview_card_desc: This preview uses the same hue-driven palette as fuwari buttons, highlights, and soft backgrounds.
settings_site_validation_invalid_email: Please enter a valid email address
settings_site_validation_invalid_asset_r: Please enter a root-relative site asset path
settings_site_validation_invalid_backgro: Please enter a root-relative site asset path or a valid http(s) image URL
settings_site_validation_invalid_asset_p: Please enter a root-relative site asset path
settings_asset_validation_file_required: Please select a file to upload
settings_asset_validation_path_invalid: Asset path must start with favicon/ or themes/default/ or themes/fuwari/
settings_asset_validation_file_too_large: File size must be less than 2MB
settings_asset_validation_file_invalid_t: Only image files (JPEG, PNG, WebP, GIF, SVG, ICO) are supported
settings_email_desc: Configure sender accounts for verification, password resets, and notifications.
settings_webhook_desc: Forward admin notifications to your preferred platforms or automation systems.
settings_maintenance_desc: Perform cleanup and maintenance operations to keep data stable.
settings_mcp_desc: Review which AI clients are connected to your MCP server and adjust their granted scopes.
settings_mcp_connections_desc: These are the AI tools and apps that have already completed OAuth authorization.
settings_mcp_empty_connections: No clients have connected yet. Once Codex or another AI agent finishes OAuth authorization, it will appear here.
settings_mcp_connection_disconnect_desc: Disconnect {client}? This revokes the current OAuth authorization.
settings_email_scope_admin_desc: New comments, pending reviews, and friend link requests will be sent to the admin email.
settings_email_scope_user_desc: Reply alerts and friend link results will be sent to users; notification toggles will be hidden on profile if disabled.
settings_email_creds_api_key_ph: re_xxxxxxxxxxxxxx, leave blank to disable email sending
settings_email_test_hint_idle: Fill out the form to send a test email
settings_webhook_global_enable_desc: Global switch. If disabled, notifications won't be sent to any endpoints.
settings_webhook_empty_desc: Add an endpoint to start forwarding notifications.
settings_webhook_endpoint_field_secret_h: Use this secret to verify the X-Flare-Signature header if verification is needed.
settings_webhook_events_desc: Select events to be forwarded to this endpoint.
settings_email_doc_tip1: The email service is a core component for user registration verification and password resets.
settings_email_doc_tip2: If not configured, the system will only support third-party OAuth logins such as GitHub.
settings_email_doc_tip3: Resend requires domain verification (DNS), otherwise emails can only be sent to the registered email address.
settings_webhook_doc_tip1: Webhooks are only for administrator-side notifications; configuration is not open to regular users.
settings_webhook_doc_tip2: The system signs the request body, facilitating source verification at the receiving end.
settings_webhook_doc_tip3: Only administrator events currently allowed for distribution via webhooks are displayed.
settings_webhook_format_desc: Webhooks are strictly sent as application/json. The receiving end can read the structured fields type and data, or directly reuse subject, message, and html.
settings_webhook_fields_desc: The data fields vary by event. Expand the event items below to view the fields and full examples for each event.
webhook_example_comment_preview: This is a test comment used to verify the Webhook chain.
webhook_example_reply_preview: This is test content used to check reply notifications.
webhook_example_description: This is an example friend link application used to test Webhook notifications.
webhook_example_subject: [New Comment] Welcome to the Notification System
webhook_example_message: Test User posted a comment on "Welcome to the Notification System": This is an example comment.
settings_maintenance_version_toast_fail_: Unable to connect to the GitHub API, please try again later.
settings_maintenance_version_toast_new_d: v{version} has been released! Click for details.
settings_maintenance_version_toast_lates: Current version v{version} is the latest.
settings_maintenance_search_desc_short: Full sync of database records to the search mapping table.
settings_maintenance_search_desc_long: Full sync of database records to the search mapping table. Recommended after manual database modifications or batch entries.
settings_maintenance_search_confirm_mess: This operation will fully scan all database logs and rebuild search mappings. Front-end search functionality may be briefly unavailable or delayed during this process. Confirm execution?
settings_maintenance_cache_desc_short: Clear CDN and KV cache, suitable when content is severely out of sync.
settings_maintenance_cache_desc_long: After execution, the homepage, article pages, and other cached content will be revalidated and regenerated. Usually only used when pages haven't updated for a long time after publishing, resource versions are abnormal, or old content persists after manual data fixes.
settings_maintenance_cache_confirm_messa: This operation will clear all cached data in both the CDN and KV. Front-end loading speed may temporarily decrease after execution. Confirm execution?
settings_maintenance_backup_desc_short: Package articles, comments, tags, and media files.
settings_maintenance_backup_desc_long: Complete packaging and encryption of all article content, tag mappings, comment records, and managed media files in the current system. Recommended before major content updates or system upgrades.
settings_maintenance_backup_toast_start_: Failed to start the export task
settings_maintenance_backup_toast_progre: Export progress data exception, please try again
settings_maintenance_backup_toast_succes: Total of {total} articles have been packaged
settings_maintenance_backup_toast_failed: The task was abnormally interrupted, please try again
settings_maintenance_restore_desc_short: Import system backup packages or Markdown files.
settings_maintenance_restore_desc_long: Supports uploading .zip backup packages exported from this system, or external Markdown files for content migration. Incremental merge, compatible with Hugo / Hexo and other mainstream frameworks.
settings_maintenance_restore_toast_uploa: Failed to upload files, please try again
settings_maintenance_restore_toast_start: Failed to start the import task
settings_maintenance_restore_toast_progr: Import progress data exception, please try again
settings_maintenance_restore_toast_faile: The task was abnormally interrupted, please check the file format and try again
settings_restore_tooltip_md: Directly upload .md files; external images will remain unchanged
settings_restore_tooltip_zip: Upload .zip files containing images; relative paths in Markdown will work as long as they correspond to files in the ZIP
settings_restore_tooltip_multiple: Multiple articles can be placed in the same ZIP and imported together
settings_restore_tooltip_compat: Compatible with frontmatter fields from Hugo, Hexo, and Jekyll
settings_restore_tooltip_note: The system performs incremental merges; articles with identical slugs will be automatically skipped.
settings_restore_result_cache_hint: It is recommended to reset the system cache to ensure the latest content takes effect immediately on the homepage.
import_export_export_warning_image_missi: Image {key} was not found in R2 (post: {title})
import_export_import_warning_empty: No importable posts were found in the ZIP
import_export_import_warning_slug_skippe: [{title}] An identical slug already exists. Skipped.
import_export_import_error_invalid_metad: Unable to parse post metadata or the metadata is invalid
email_auth_verification_desc: Please click the link below to verify your email. This step helps keep your account secure.
email_auth_reset_desc: We received a request to reset your account password. If you did not make this request, you can ignore this email.
email_auth_link_fallback: If the button does not work, copy and paste this link into your browser:
email_comment_admin_pending_preview: {commenterName} left a comment on "{postTitle}" that needs review
email_comment_admin_pending_intro: {commenterName} left a comment on "{postTitle}" that needs review:
email_comment_reply_subject: [Comment Reply] {replierName} replied to your comment on "{postTitle}"
email_comment_reply_unsubscribe_hint: Don't want to receive these notifications anymore?
email_friend_link_approved_preview: Your friend link request ({siteName}) was approved
email_friend_link_rejected_preview: Your friend link request ({siteName}) was not approved
email_friend_link_approved_body: Good news! Your site {siteName} has been approved for our friend links.
email_friend_link_rejected_body: Sorry, your site {siteName} was not approved for our friend links.
email_friend_link_rejected_followup: If you have questions, feel free to submit again.
email_webhook_comment_admin_pending_mess: {commenterName} left a comment on "{postTitle}" that needs review: {commentPreview} {reviewUrl}
